symptom: 4 advisories at the 3-in-a-row repeated-tool branch: STOP SEARCHING (search_web), STOP running shell_exec (build failing), generic shell_exec stall, generic repeated-tool stall. Each asked the drone to pivot and let it keep going.
root_cause: same shape as round 16 — nudge without enforcement. Every advisory in this branch was a force candidate.
fix_approach: one-pass conversion — set _loop_forced_tool to the right next action per case: search_web→file_write, shell_exec+errors→file_edit, shell_exec+no-errors→message_result, generic→message_result. No add_system_note emissions left in the branch.
principle: v5 — the pattern established in round 16 (advisory → _loop_forced_tool) generalizes. Each conversion is now ~10 lines of diff.

desc: shell_exec with errors stall forces file_edit
shell_exec without errors stall forces message_result
